nodes.name: Mangrove fantail
nodes.summary: The mangrove fantail (Rhipidura phasiana) is a species of bird in the family Rhipiduridae. It is found in the Aru Islands and along the coast of southeastern New Guinea, western and northern Australia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical mangrove forests. References

nodes.name: Mangrove fantail
nodes.summary: Mangrove fantail（Rhipidura phasiana）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Mangrove fantail。

nodes.name: Rhipidura
nodes.summary: Rhipidura（Rhipidura）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联59种鸟类，如Black fantail、Black-and-cinnamon fantail、Mindanao blue fantail等59种鸟类。
